moduleTitle: Purpose, Scope of VT, and Elements of Vision

lessons.title: Purpose and Scope of Visual Testing
objectives: Describe the quality control roles of VT for internal, customer, and authority oversight
Identify what VT looks for: discontinuities, shape and geometry deviations, and surface finish
Distinguish VT applied during manufacture from in-service VT

lessons.title: Mechanics of Vision, Adaptation, and Vision Limitations
objectives: Explain the mechanics of vision including adaptation and accommodation
Describe vision limitations from perception, environment, orientation, visual angle, and distance
Recognize how ophthalmic disorders, mental attitude, fatigue, and physiology affect inspection performance

lessons.title: Vision Acuity Examinations and Charts
objectives: Describe common vision acuity tests and the charts used to administer them
Explain color and gray shade differentiation requirements for VT personnel
State why periodic vision examinations are required for certification
